headline: Southwest Airlines (LUV) Stock May Trade At A Premium To Fair Value
summary: Southwest Airlines stock has delivered a strong 50.2% return over the past year, yet the broader valuation checks suggest it may no longer be an obvious bargain even as optimism builds around recent business changes and an upgrade from Morgan Stanley. Over the last 12 months, Southwest Airlines is up 50.2%, which puts extra focus on whether recent gains already reflect improved expectations. Morgan Stanley's upgrade, tied to changes like assigned seating and new add-on services, can support...

headline: Southwest Airlines leaves rivals flat-footed as bankrupt carrier folds
summary: Southwest Airlines has spent the past year and a half rebuilding its business from the ground up. Now that work is colliding with a once-in-a-generation opening: the collapse of Spirit Airlines. And based on new research from Morgan Stanley, Southwest Airlines (LUV) planned for this moment ...
